description: Minimal MCP server for downloading Gmail attachments to disk. Read-only OAuth by default.
name: io.github.zayansalman/gmail-attachments-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Path to the Google OAuth client secret JSON. Default: $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/gmail-attachments-mcp/credentials.json.
environmentVariables.name: GMAIL_MCP_CREDENTIALS

environmentVariables.description: Path to the cached Gmail OAuth refresh token. Default: $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/gmail-attachments-mcp/token.json.
environmentVariables.name: GMAIL_MCP_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Default directory where downloaded attachments are saved when the tool call does not specify dest_dir. Default: ~/Downloads.
environmentVariables.name: GMAIL_MCP_DEFAULT_DEST_DIR

packageArguments.description: Subcommand that runs the stdio MCP server.
